final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) cover image featuring a DJI Pocket 4 camera in a casual amateur creator style.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu native content aesthetic, casual amateur creator vibe, playful and approachable visual language
Composition: 9-grid layout structure, centered title placement, vertical portrait format optimized for mobile feed
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 camera as hero product, displayed in natural everyday context suggesting first-time user experience
Color palette: soft pastel tones with warm accents, friendly and inviting, avoiding corporate coldness
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验"
Typography: cute and differentiated font style, rounded and playful letterforms, friendly personality
Constraints: must feel authentically amateur/UGC rather than polished commercial; 9-grid composition must be visible; text must be central and prominent
Avoid: professional studio lighting, stock photo aesthetic, generic sans-serif fonts, overly polished commercial look, influencer-perfect staging
